name: Sumitomo Chemical India Limited
summary: Sumitomo Chemical India Limited manufactures and sells household insecticides, agricultural pesticides, public health insecticides, and animal nutrition products in India and internationally. The company operates through two segments, Agro Chemicals and Others. It offers crop protection products, such as insecticides, herbicides, fungicides, and miticides; plant nutrition and plant growth regulators; household pesticides; animal nutrition products; fumigants and rodenticides; and bio-pesticides. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India. Sumitomo Chemical India Limited is a subsidiary of Sumitomo Chemical Company Limited.
